creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #2)

> Is this update really necessary?

That is a good question i also asked myself before creating the PR.

At least i think: yes. The patch adds the missing license and fix the wrong URL in pkg-descr. I thinks this is already sufficient. 

Also i believe the update is worthy, because the module deprecates itself. While still usable the user should know there is a better approach to use.

Also we may consider to set an expiration date for this port. Its deprecated since 2 years and if there are no ports depending on it, it should be safe to remove it from the portstree.
